project_type: Python HFT trading bot with MQL5 EA bridge
test_framework: pytest with per-module test files in tests/
verification_instructions: Run pytest; 121 existing tests pass, 5 pre-existing failures in test_tick_collector (encoding issue unrelated to our changes). All new tests must pass.
environment_constraints: No MT5 runtime available. No Docker. Tests must be pure Python unit tests. The tick_collector reads from a local file written by an MT5 EA (not available in sandbox).
contribution_requirements: All config parameters go in Config class in config.py. New modules can be created. Tests must be added for new logic. Version bump to 9.30, build 20250702.
key_patterns: Config class holds all parameters. Main loop reads ticks via TickCollector, computes momentum/regime, fires signals via Bridge. Filters are chained (cooldown, capacity, direction lock, hysteresis, ATR, tick consistency, signal persistence). Bridge writes signal files + intelligence file for EA. Tests use tmp_path fixtures, mock time/datetime, manipulate tick_prices deque directly.
directory_structure: Root: config.py, main.py, momentum.py, tick_collector.py, bridge.py, trailing_stop.py, backtest.py. tests/ has test_bridge.py, test_main_logic.py, test_momentum.py, test_tick_collector.py. Include/ has MQL5 headers. NeuroX_EA_v9.mq5 is the EA.
